news.title:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.
news.summary:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.

news.title:
Federal Bank's board to meet on April 29, 2026, to approve FY26 audited results and propose final dividend.
Trading window for Federal Bank securities closed from April 1 to May 1, 2026, per insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Federal Bank's board to meet on April 29, 2026, to approve FY26 audited results and propose final dividend.
Trading window for Federal Bank securities closed from April 1 to May 1, 2026, per insider trading regulations.

news.title:
Federal Bank received IT refund orders for AY 2015-16 and 2017-18 totaling ₹489.6 crore.
The refund, including interest, is based on an ITAT ruling dated Aug 2024.
news.summary:
Federal Bank received IT refund orders for AY 2015-16 and 2017-18 totaling ₹489.6 crore.
The refund, including interest, is based on an ITAT ruling dated Aug 2024.

news.title:
Federal Bank receives ₹489.6 Cr tax refund for FY 2015-16, 2017-18.
Refund issued under Section 254 by the tax department.
news.summary:
Federal Bank receives ₹489.6 Cr tax refund for FY 2015-16, 2017-18.
Refund issued under Section 254 by the tax department.

news.title:
Banking sector valuations attract post US-Iran war correction; ICICI Bank, SBI, Federal Bank top picks.
Nifty PSU Bank index fell 16%, Nifty Private Bank declined 14.5%; Axis Securities favours strong liability franchises.
news.summary:
Banking sector valuations attract post US-Iran war correction; ICICI Bank, SBI, Federal Bank top picks.
Nifty PSU Bank index fell 16%, Nifty Private Bank declined 14.5%; Axis Securities favours strong liability franchises.

news.title:
Federal Bank held an Analyst/Investor meet with IFC on March 23, 2026, in Mumbai.
The meeting was a one-on-one physical interaction with no presentations made.
news.summary:
Federal Bank held an Analyst/Investor meet with IFC on March 23, 2026, in Mumbai.
The meeting was a one-on-one physical interaction with no presentations made.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank leads bid to acquire Deutsche Bank's ₹27,000 cr India retail portfolio, surpassing Federal Bank's offer.
Shares of Kotak fell 1.9% to ₹359.7, extending a 16.6% decline in the past month amid market selloff.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank leads bid to acquire Deutsche Bank's ₹27,000 cr India retail portfolio, surpassing Federal Bank's offer.
Shares of Kotak fell 1.9% to ₹359.7, extending a 16.6% decline in the past month amid market selloff.

news.title: Federal Bank allots 2.17 lakh shares under ESOS on 22 March 2026.
news.summary: Federal Bank allots 2.17 lakh shares under ESOS on 22 March 2026.

news.title:
StanChart reviews offers from Kotak Mahindra Bank and Federal Bank to acquire 600,000 credit-card-only customers.
The potential acquisition involves Standard Chartered's credit card customer base in India, as per sources.
news.summary:
StanChart reviews offers from Kotak Mahindra Bank and Federal Bank to acquire 600,000 credit-card-only customers.
The potential acquisition involves Standard Chartered's credit card customer base in India, as per sources.

news.title:
Federal Bank to meet Abakkus Asset Manager today for collaboration talks.
Discussions will focus on potential investment opportunities.
news.summary:
Federal Bank to meet Abakkus Asset Manager today for collaboration talks.
Discussions will focus on potential investment opportunities.

news.title:
Federal Bank CEO KVS Manian states it's too early for equity to FD shift.
Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC CEO notes steady mutual fund inflows amid volatility.
news.summary:
Federal Bank CEO KVS Manian states it's too early for equity to FD shift.
Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC CEO notes steady mutual fund inflows amid volatility.

news.title:
Federal Bank launched Fed Wealth platform, inaugurating its first Wealth Hub for strategic expansion in wealth management.
The Bank offers curated investment solutions, including fixed income, equities, mutual funds, alternatives, and GIFT City opportunities.
news.summary:
Federal Bank launched Fed Wealth platform, inaugurating its first Wealth Hub for strategic expansion in wealth management.
The Bank offers curated investment solutions, including fixed income, equities, mutual funds, alternatives, and GIFT City opportunities.

news.title:
Federal Bank plans to restructure its wealth management arrangement with Equirus Capital.
It aims to invest more and build its own franchise for growth in wealth management.
news.summary:
Federal Bank plans to restructure its wealth management arrangement with Equirus Capital.
It aims to invest more and build its own franchise for growth in wealth management.

news.title:
Federal Bank sees 12.2% surge in derivatives open interest, indicating market activity.
Stock fell 5.2% in two days, underperforming sector by 2% on March 4, 2026.
news.summary:
Federal Bank sees 12.2% surge in derivatives open interest, indicating market activity.
Stock fell 5.2% in two days, underperforming sector by 2% on March 4, 2026.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
Federal Bank may see USD 454M (Rs 41.3B) inclusions via MSCI rejig.
The MSCI February adjustment is expected to impact Federal Bank's valuation.
news.summary:
Federal Bank may see USD 454M (Rs 41.3B) inclusions via MSCI rejig.
The MSCI February adjustment is expected to impact Federal Bank's valuation.

news.title:
Federal Bank informed about its participation in IIFL's 17th Enterprising India Global Investors Conference on Feb 25, 2026.
The bank held meetings with notable investors like ABRDN Group, HDFC ERGO, and SBI Mutual Fund; no presentations were made.
news.summary:
Federal Bank informed about its participation in IIFL's 17th Enterprising India Global Investors Conference on Feb 25, 2026.
The bank held meetings with notable investors like ABRDN Group, HDFC ERGO, and SBI Mutual Fund; no presentations were made.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Federal Bank to receive Rs 686 crore tax refund, boosting Q4 profitability.
Refund pertains to AY 2011-14, with past Q3 earnings at Rs 1,041 crore.
news.summary:
Federal Bank to receive Rs 686 crore tax refund, boosting Q4 profitability.
Refund pertains to AY 2011-14, with past Q3 earnings at Rs 1,041 crore.

news.title:
Waaree Energies plans ₹8,000 crore battery facility; ABB India Q4 revenue rose 5.7% YoY to ₹3,557 crore, net profit fell 18% to ₹433 crore.
Karur Vysya Bank cuts 1-yr MCLR to 9.1%; Federal Bank gets ₹686 crore tax refund; Texmaco-RVNL JV to enhance rail manufacturing capabilities.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies plans ₹8,000 crore battery facility; ABB India Q4 revenue rose 5.7% YoY to ₹3,557 crore, net profit fell 18% to ₹433 crore.
Karur Vysya Bank cuts 1-yr MCLR to 9.1%; Federal Bank gets ₹686 crore tax refund; Texmaco-RVNL JV to enhance rail manufacturing capabilities.
